title: HalfGravityPull
description: This is a mod, that pull the players at half gravity, not just down, at X row in 3D
body:
!!!!IMPORTANT!!!!

Hello Everyone! I seen, 87 of you guys, downloaded my mod, tahnk you so much for every donwload! My Name is Elod Schäffer, I'm 11 years old. And, suddenly, I lost the source code of the mod, so no unfortunetly, no future development will be made. Exept, some reverse engineer contacts me (elod716@gmail.com), and give me the reversed src, but I don't think so. So, lastly, thanks for every donwload, and I'm sorry




Now it's 1.2.1 is the latest version, so it'S pulls the players, (Just players) in the X row of Minecraft's 3D gravity, reduce a little from the Vanilla gravity, because sometimes, Minecraft thinks, he's got to add both gravity types together, but it's just doubles damage. So it's solved with a new mixin, what makes difference between the 2 type of gravityes. and Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), i'm working, to make it better every day!

And i think (I don't think REALLY it will happens in the 1.2.1-9 but okay) I will release a verion with: A new item, what stops the HalfGravityPull, and a crafting for it. So it needs an effect i think. But, it will be in the future, because it's developed by just me, in IntelliJ IDEA!  ([IntelliJ IDEA's link](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/download/?section=windows) ) MIT License, and sorry, no galery, because it don't seems like if i'm really pulled in X row. (You just get pulled by the X row in gravity, if you are in survival, and adventure. NOT in creative, and NOT in spectator. Thanks for all downloads!
If you want the source code, comment it to halfgravitypullcomments@gmail.com and if more than 5 pearson needs it, i will place it here.
